{{nihongo|'''Yanakihara Shrine'''|楊原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

| mapframe = yes

{{nihongo|'''Yanakihara Shrine'''|楊原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yanakihara Shrine'''|楊原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Yanakihara Shrine'''|楊原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 楊原神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Yanakihara Shrine'''|楊原神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
